response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver, plus distributed/high-throughput work at Sociomantic. However, the resume shows TypeScript/Node.js and DLang as primary languages with no demonstrated Python expertise — a must-have for this role. Distributed systems depth is present but somewhat dated, and there is limited evidence of staff-level technical strategy ownership or stakeholder coordination at scale.
strengths: Current hands-on work with AI agents, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at Naver
Prior high-throughput distributed systems experience (millions of req/sec at Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, teaching/workshops
concerns: No Python listed in skills or employment history — a must-have for the role
Limited evidence of staff-level technical strategy, stakeholder management, or cross-functional leadership
No mention of on-call/incident-response experience or operational ownership at scale
